title: Senior Software Engineer - Vodafone Idea Holdings Services - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Vodafone Idea Holdings Services - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Vodafone Idea Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Vodafone Idea Holdings Services:
Vodafone Idea Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vodafone Idea Holdings Services!
